titleStmt.title: SII 5.1004: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1004. (A.R. No. 139 of 1896). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SHRINE IN THE SIVA TEMPLE AT DAMAL, CONJEEVERAM TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . śvasti śrīman mahā maṇḍaleśvara Ariyarāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣai kkut tappuvarāyarakaṇṭa mūvarāyarakaṇṭa turukkataḷavipāṭa rājā tirāja rāja parameśvaran
śrīkṛṣṇadevama hārā yar kumārar tirumalaiyade vamahārāyar pṛdivirājyam paṇṇiaruḷāniṉṟa cakāṟtam 1000 4 100 4 10 6- ṉ melcellāniṉṟa tāraṇavaruṣattu vṛścika- nāyaṟṟu pūrva
pakṣa ttu deśa miyum Āditya vāramum peṟṟa hastanakṣatra ttu nāḷ tirumalaiyadevama hārā yaṟkut taṉmamākat tāmar Uṭaiyavar tiruppaṉṟicuramuṭaiya tampirāṉār tirukkoyil pūcai puṉaskāra mum
pala tiruppaṇiyum cantiṟātitya varaiyum naṭakkumpaṭiyāka Aṉantāḻvār piḷḷai Upayamākap puṅkañceri Uṭaiyār namacivāyam viṭuvitta kiṟāmam tāmaril piṭākaiyāṉa puṟakāl kiṟāmam Oṉṟu
Intap puṟakāl kiṟāmam Oṉṟum Eṟuṅkuṭiyum Eṟṟikkoṇṭu nañcai puñcai nāṟpāṟkellai veṇṭum payirum Eṟṟikkoṇṭu Itil Uṇṭāṉa cittāya mutalum cakala
Ātāyamum Iṉṉayiṉār tirukkoyil pūcai tiruppaṇiyile Iṭṭu naṭattakkaṭavatākavum Intap puṟakāl kiṟāmam Oṉṟum Iṉṉayiṉāṟkuc cantiṟātitya varaiyum tevatāṉam
āka naṭakkakakaṭavatākavum Inta taṉmat(t)tukku yātoruttar Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ keṅkaikkaraiyile kārāmpacuvaiyum taṉṉiṭaiya kuruvaiyum taṉ
mātāpitāvaiyum koṉṟa pāvattile pokakkaṭavarkaḷāvum
Digital edition of SII 5.1004 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
